nasb.text: Of the Levites were Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;

esv.text: Of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, son of Azrikam, son of Hashabiah, of the sons of Merari;

cnv.text: 利未支派米拉利的子孫中，有哈沙比雅的曾孫、押利甘的孫子、哈述的兒子示瑪雅；

ccb.text: 回来的利未人有米拉利的后代哈沙比雅的曾孙、押利甘的孙子、哈述的儿子示玛雅，
